    # Combine base models and meta-model into a stacking classifier

def solve(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val):

    rf_clf = make_pipeline(TfidfVectorizer(), RandomForestClassifier())
    rf_clf.fit(X_train, y_train)
    
    # Predict on validation set
    y_pred_rf = rf_clf.predict(X_val)
    
    # Evaluate accuracy of the RF model
    acc_rf = accuracy_score(y_val, y_pred_rf)
    
    if acc_rf > 0.8427:
        return y_pred_rf
    
    # Train a GradientBoostingClassifier
    gb_clf = make_pipeline(TfidfVectorizer(), GradientBoostingClassifier())
    gb_clf.fit(X_train, y_train)
    
    # Predict on validation set
    y_pred_gb = gb_clf.predict(X_val)
    
    # Evaluate accuracy of the GB model
    acc_gb = accuracy_score(y_val, y_pred_gb)
    
    if acc_gb > 0.8427:
        return y_pred_gb
    
    # Train a SVC classifier

    # Train the base model

    # Train the ensemble model

    predictions_ensemble = pipeline_ensemble.predict(X_val)
    
    # Combine the predictions using majority voting
    final_predictions = (predictions_base + predictions_ensemble) // 2
    
    return np.array(final_predictions, dtype=int)

    vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
    pipeline = make_pipeline(vectorizer, model)
    
    # Train the model
    pipeline.fit(X_train, y_train)
    
    # Predict on validation set
    predictions = pipeline.predict(X_val)
    
    return np.array(predictions)
